title: Has anybody else finished Shinji Ikari Raising Project
display_title: Has anybody else finished Shinji Ikari Raising Project
wikitext:
[]: Has anybody else finished Shinji Ikari Raising Project?             Quote Post by Zeak » Mon May 19, 2008 4:20 am I just finished the game and WTF its close to EOE finish same shit happens but Misato is talking to Shinji on the beach????? WTF happened I couldent understand the Jap or what was going on at that point???? Everything happened the same then Misato started to talk http://img221.imageshack.us/img221/5412/eoewtfnx3.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Mon May 19, 2008 6:09 am I really don't understand what you're talking about. Can you rephrase that, please?

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Mon May 19, 2008 6:12 am You dont have the game so you wont understand. If you did you would know what im talking about

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Mon May 19, 2008 6:19 am Well, since it was 3I, wouldn't any person who was "killed" before 31 able to go back to their "normal, separated" LCL state? Maybe Shinji allowd instrumentation to happen, so Misato could come back "to life" after 3I?

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Mon May 19, 2008 6:23 am go play it then come back and you will know what i mean. If you want ill send you the torrent file

[]:             Quote Post by Zerogoki » Mon May 19, 2008 7:46 am [url]http://uk.youtube.com/watch?v=fVPn7x41yT0[/url] Is this what happened? I haven't played it myself, but it seems that in the scenario you had, your relationship with Misato was better than the others, and so instead of Asuka coming back you got Misato instead. 'Fraid I'm no help on the translation, but maybe the vid will help those translation-monkeys on this forum... Hope it helped a little anyway!

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Mon May 19, 2008 12:05 pm Hmmm, Asuka's hair seems off in the end of that game, why does she look so much like that purple haired woman? Okay, okay, yeah that is far different than the actual movie. But it's a game, the people didn't want to make it that predictable.

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Mon May 19, 2008 5:45 pm Misato says: ここは。。。どう？ which means "Here...how is it?" So she's asking him how he feels about the place he's in. I can't get what Shinji's saying, as the kanji are obscured, and I probably don't know them anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Mon May 19, 2008 5:55 pm I always loved that game...can't you even marry Misato in it? Giving a WTF moment of EPIC levels.

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Tue May 20, 2008 1:34 am I clicked randomly but I baut cake for Asuka every time I went out with her there is some other stuff to boost your relationship with her . If you want to get into a relationship with Misato talk to her every sunday. There is also some other shit like stuff with hikari ect. Still I was expecting Asuka not Misato

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Tue May 20, 2008 5:32 am I think if I was gonna spend the rest of eternity in a post-apocalyptic wasteland, I'd probably prefer to spend it with Misato than Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue May 20, 2008 12:37 pm From what I understand, this game ending is similar to the Good End (so I guess this is the Game's Bad End?) where Shinji ends up married/together with to whoever he romantically went after. Apparently you played the game so Shinji and Misato are a couple or some such thing. I've seen a screenshot of Kaworu/Shinji on the Beach, so that's probably what's going on. If this is indeed one of the Game's Bad Ends (with 3I occurring), it makes me wonder just what you have to do to get a Good Ending. Kaminoyouni played and beat the game, maybe he could help. (And no, I haven't played the game yet, I'd first need to find a bloody torrent/download that works for me. ) With the video link that Zerogoki posted (thanks! It really helps! ), Kaworu and Rei tell Shinji that "This is the world he wished for, he can decide what he wants", Shinji: "The world I wished for?" blah blah blah, Instrumentality is rejected. Waking up on the beach, Misato asks Shinji, who's relived Misato's okay, "Where is this?" and Shinji answers something along the lines of "Everything is back to normal. We're on Earth." And to my horror/slight interest *cough* (yeah I sort of like the Shinji/Misato pairing though I'm Asuka/Shinji all the way) Shinji says how he'll be always together with Misato-san. tl;dr: Needs MOAR Asuka-sama.

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Tue May 20, 2008 2:29 pm master_lloyd wrote: I think if I was gonna spend the rest of eternity in a post-apocalyptic wasteland, I'd probably prefer to spend it with Misato than Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Tue May 20, 2008 3:49 pm ...I don't know she'd also be very horny

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Wed May 21, 2008 4:50 am Ok thatnks SSD that helps want me to send you the game? Also I think I have the Asuka ending now after a quick recap and save I should be able to get up screens from that. Still I have no Idea what I did lol. [URL=http://img228.imageshack.us/my.php?image=reireireiuv2.jpg] [/URL] *edit* think I fucked it up I ended up getting game over and spending a little to much time with Mr plot device

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed May 21, 2008 12:22 pm want me to send you the game?

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Thu May 22, 2008 4:28 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: want me to send you the game?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu May 22, 2008 5:39 pm Actually, the Eva2 games involves Eva-04 too in this slightly AU Scenario where Kaworu was the third Angel to appear and Touji along with Shinji stopped him. Kaworu is Eva-04's pilot as he tries to discover his true identity: Adam. @ Zeak: But that's Ms. Plot Deceive, not Mr. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Zeak » Thu May 22, 2008 10:36 pm Lol I was talking about Kaworu

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri May 23, 2008 1:08 am Zeak wrote: Lol I was talking about Kaworu
